title: Anthropic Built a Real Ultron?
description:
Some AI models are becoming too powerful to release publicly.

Reports suggest Anthropic has been testing advanced systems that can find vulnerabilities, bypass controls, and outperform human researchers in cybersecurity tasks.

The real question is no longer what AI can create — but what it can control.
